rootCause: R6 blocked startup on 4.2 MB and 11 MB monolithic GeoJSON source parsing with 35-second fatal timeouts.
The 6.7 MB search catalog started concurrently and competed with map, satellite and label downloads on slow mobile networks.
The failure path displayed a toast but did not remove the loading overlay.

fix.satellite: MapTiler satellite-v4 primary when key is present; Esri z16 fallback with overzoom
